The '''''Helping Hand''''' was a modified [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighter]] owned by the [[Starship/Legends|starship]] mechanic and [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] sympathizer [[Plu Makor]].

{{Ship-stub}}
